chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5887 - وَ قَالَ الصَّادِقُ ع‌ حَسْبُ الْمُؤْمِنِ مِنَ اللَّهِ نُصْرَةً أَنْ يَرَى عَدُوَّهُ يَعْمَلُ بِمَعَاصِي اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5887 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Sufficient is it for a believer as support from Allah (swt) to see his enemy engaging in acts of disobedience to Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic."
